info.description: Backend API for the DevOps demo project.
info.title: DevOps Demo API

get.description: Get all audit logs. Admin only.
Search audit logs by table name, record id, user id, action, old value, or new value. Admin only.
Get a single audit log by ID. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete a user account. Admin only.

patch.description: Approve or suspend a user by is_approve flag. Admin only.

post.description: Login with username or email and password to get access token. You must provide EITHER username OR email, not both

parameters.description: Login credentials (provide EITHER username OR email with password, not both)
parameters.name: request

400.description: Bad Request - Missing credentials, sent both username and email, or missing password

post.description: Register a new user with username, email, password, and role

patch.description: Reset password for authenticated user with old password verification

400.description: Bad Request - Old password invalid or passwords are the same

patch.description: Partially update authenticated user's profile. Only send fields that need to be updated.

get.description: Get users by their first and last name (case-insensitive, space-trimmed)
get.summary: Get Users By First and Last Name

400.description: Bad Request - Missing required query parameters

get.description: Get warehouse dashboard summary including low stock items and pending approval requests
Get warehouse items with optional search and category filters

parameters.description: Search by item name or code
parameters.name: search

delete.description: Delete a warehouse item by item ID

patch.description: Update warehouse item fields by item ID

post.description: Adjust item quantity by restock or withdraw mode

get.description: Get warehouse transaction history with optional filters

parameters.description: Search by item name or item code
parameters.name: searchItem

parameters.description: Approval status (รออนุมัติ, อนุมัติ, ไม่อนุมัติ)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Transaction type (เพิ่มสินค้าใหม่, เติมสินค้า, เบิกสินค้า, นำออก)
parameters.name: type

patch.description: Reject selected pending warehouse transactions with reason

get.description: Get warehouse transaction detail by transaction ID

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
